channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tropical Storm Bertha makes landfall with limited damage expected
item.description: Damage is expected to be limited due to the El Niño weather pattern, but unusually warm Atlantic waters could still pose risks.

item.title: Trump increases campaign pace in 2026 midterms compared to 2018
item.description: President Trump heads to Georgia on Wednesday, having campaigned more frequently this year than during the same period in 2018.

item.title: States seek to extend Medicaid to prisoners, but federal changes complicate efforts
item.description: Budget cuts and program changes from President Trump's budget law force states to reconsider bipartisan plans to expand Medicaid behind bars.

item.title: Regulatory scrutiny intensifies for peptides
item.description: An FDA advisory panel will meet this week to discuss whether specialized pharmacies should be permitted to compound certain peptides.
